chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 675 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on MA No.5864/2023 (U/A) 2. For orders on MA No.5865/2023 (E/A) 3. For hearing of bail application 03.10.2023 Mr. Abdul Sami Kalhoro, Advocate for applicant/accused..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is granted. 2. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 3. Through this bail application, applicant/accused Deedar Hussain S/o Wahid Bakhsh seeks protective bail in Crime No.120 of 2006 under Sections 302, 148, 149, 114 PPC, registered at Police Station Lakhi Ghulam Shah, District Shikarpur. Learned Counsel for applicant/accused contends that applicant is innocent, has been falsely implicated in this case. He further contends that applicant/accused is ready to appear before the Court concerned along with an application under Section 498 CrPC to prove his innocence, however, he apprehends his immediate arrest as non-bailable warrants has been issued against him; hence, he seeks protective bail. Without touching merits and de-merits of the case, protective bail for a period of seven days w.e.f. 03.10.2023 to 09.10.2023 (both days inclusive) is granted to applicant/accused subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.1,00,000/- (Rupees one lac) and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. Operation of non- Cr. Bail App. No. S – 675 of 2023 Page 2 of 2 bailable warrants in this case shall remain suspended during aforesaid period. Applicant/accused is directed to surrender before the Court concerned in the said period.

S – 675 of 2023 Page 2 of 2 bailable warrants in this case shall remain suspended during aforesaid period. Applicant/accused is directed to surrender before the Court concerned in the said period. This order shall cease to have its effect after expiry of above mentioned period or whenever applicant/accused surrenders before the Court concerned, which one occurs earlier. It is, however, made clear that in case applicant/accused fails to surrender before the Court concerned within stipulated period, his bail bond shall stand automatically forfeited. Criminal Bail Application stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E Abdul Basit
